one_time_description: Advances to Band members related to 1919 land claim recovered during year (change of $5,568,000)
economic_notes: Investment in Limited Partnership of $35,714,286 made during 2021. Wallace Hill Development Inc. accounted for on modified equity basis. Investments in Beaubassin Mi'kmaq Wind Mgmt Ltd. and 3270886 Nova Scotia Limited also held.
notes: Large Investment in Limited Partnership of $35,714,286 recorded as capital activity and financial asset. Other revenue line is negative (-$1,479,941) in 2021 vs $961,618 in 2020 — unusual. Total expenses per cash flow/operations statement include amortization ($1,871,276) and interest on long-term debt ($423,033) as other expenses. Prior year expenses calculated as $39,405,507 program expenditures plus $1,900,675 other expenses = $41,306,182. Total government transfers estimated as ISC $12,653,399 + Health Canada $3,102,432 + Mi'kmaw Kina'matnewey $9,559,121 = $25,314,952 (approximate). Cannabis inventory introduced in 2021 at $56,035. Accumulated surplus on balance sheet shows $15,560,683 vs $15,560,678 on operations statement (rounding difference of $5).
